privileged_info_summary: The task involves Floreant POS 1.4 (open-source restaurant POS system). All synthetic test data is created in setup_task.sh via Derby SQL INSERT statements: a menu item 'Grilled Ribeye Steak' (ID 9901, price $24.99) and a modifier group 'Cooking Preference' (ID 9901) are inserted into a Derby database. The manager PIN for Back Office access is 1111. The task verifies that these two entities can be linked via the Back Office UI by checking the MENU_ITEM_MODIFIER_GROUP join table.
